'''fakono''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Nouns|noun]] meaning "[[Wikt:chaetophore|chaetophore]] (auto-generated)". It has inherent '''female''' gender.

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| f-k-n
|-
! Word class
| [[Noun]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:chaetophore|chaetophore]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Inherent gender
| female
|-
! Citation form
| fakono
|}

== Inflected forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || [[word:fækeneth|fækeneth]] || [[word:fækenej|fækenej]] || [[word:fækenesh|fækenesh]] || [[word:fækene|fækene]]
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || [[word:fakokonoth|fakokonoth]] || [[word:fakokonoj|fakokonoj]] || [[word:fakokonosh|fakokonosh]] || [[word:fakokono|fakokono]]
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || [[word:fakonoth|fakonoth]] || [[word:fakonoj|fakonoj]] || [[word:fakonosh|fakonosh]] || [[word:fakono|fakono]]
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:fakofnoth|fakofnoth]] || [[word:fakofnoj|fakofnoj]] || [[word:fakofnosh|fakofnosh]] || [[word:fakofnof|fakofnof]]
|}

''16 forms generated.''

== Case paradigm ==
''Shown for female singular.''
{| class="wikitable"
! Case !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[Agent]] || [[word:fakonotho|fakonotho]] || [[word:fakonojo|fakonojo]] || [[word:fakonosho|fakonosho]] || [[word:fakonoko|fakonoko]]
|-
| [[Patient]] || [[word:fakonoth|fakonoth]] || [[word:fakonoj|fakonoj]] || [[word:fakonosh|fakonosh]] || [[word:fakono|fakono]]
|-
| [[Possessive]] || [[word:fakonothol|fakonothol]] || [[word:fakonojol|fakonojol]] || [[word:fakonoshol|fakonoshol]] || [[word:fakonokol|fakonokol]]
|-
| [[Instrumental]] || [[word:fakonothotho|fakonothotho]] || [[word:fakonojojo|fakonojojo]] || [[word:fakonoshosho|fakonoshosho]] || [[word:fakonoko|fakonoko]]
|-
| [[Dative]] || [[word:fakonothon|fakonothon]] || [[word:fakonojon|fakonojon]] || [[word:fakonoshon|fakonoshon]] || [[word:fakonokon|fakonokon]]
|-
| [[Speaker]] || [[word:fakonothoro|fakonothoro]] || [[word:fakonojoro|fakonojoro]] || [[word:fakonoshoro|fakonoshoro]] || [[word:fakonokoro|fakonokoro]]
|}

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki female nouns]]
[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|4f6272c}}
